pattern: A word follows valid capitalization if it is all uppercase, all lowercase, or only its first letter is uppercase, which reduces to a few simple case checks.
hints: There are only three accepted shapes; enumerate them.
Count how many letters are uppercase, or inspect the first two characters.
Valid when every letter is uppercase, every letter is lowercase, or just the first letter is uppercase and the rest lowercase.

stress.description: random words that are sometimes valid and sometimes not
